description: Curated list of publicly-known defense supply-chain stress events from 2022-2025. Each event names a vendor with documented sole-source or capacity-constraint exposure that produced a real DoD program disruption, mission delay, or industrial-base report. We use this list to validate Chokepoint's model — does the supervised ranker surface these vendors *before* needing the news to tell us?

events.summary: Sentinel program reported 81% cost growth, triggered Nunn-McCurdy review. Northrop Grumman is sole prime; no alternative supplier for ICBM stage propulsion or guidance integration exists. Industrial-base concentration was a named cause.
events.citation: DoD Acquisition & Sustainment, Nunn-McCurdy notification Jan 2024

events.summary: Ukraine demand outstripped Patriot interceptor production capacity. Raytheon sole-sources Patriot integration and key seekers. DoD allocated $1B+ to multi-year production ramp.

events.event: Solid rocket motor monopoly (HIMARS / Patriot / Stinger / Javelin)
events.summary: Aerojet Rocketdyne is the only domestic supplier of solid-propellant rocket motors for HIMARS, GMLRS, Patriot, Stinger, and Javelin. Lockheed Martin's 2023 acquisition was blocked by FTC over chokepoint concerns; L3Harris completed acquisition mid-2023.
events.citation: FTC v. Lockheed Martin/Aerojet Rocketdyne, 2022; L3Harris-AR merger filings 2023

events.event: KC-46 tanker and Starliner program troubles
events.summary: Boeing sole-prime on multiple delayed major programs (KC-46, Starliner, Air Force One). $2B+ in charges across defense divisions FY2023-2024. Supply-chain concentration in Boeing Defense, Space & Security.
L3Harris acquired Aerojet Rocketdyne mid-2023, inheriting sole-source position on Sentinel second-stage propulsion. Industrial-base reports flagged concentration concerns.
events.citation: Office of Industrial Base Policy report 2024

events.summary: GD Electric Boat is sole-source on Columbia-class submarine hulls and integrated platform systems. Delayed deliveries cascaded across SSBN replacement timeline.
TransDigm sole-sources aircraft spare parts across multiple legacy platforms. DoD IG documented systemic overcharging enabled by sole-source position.
events.citation: DoD IG audit DODIG-2019-060 and 2024 follow-up

events.summary: Rockwell Collins (now Collins Aerospace, RTX subsidiary) sole-sources mission computer hardware on F-35. Joint Program Office flagged single-vendor risk in 2023 sustainment review.
BAE Systems Land & Armaments is sole-prime on M109A7 self-propelled howitzer. Ukraine demand stressed production; Army committed multi-year buy to incentivize capacity expansion.
Textron Systems holds concentrated position in unmanned ground and short-range loitering systems. Replicator initiative explicitly cited need to diversify suppliers in this category.
